plan_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<plan id="test-question-field-001" title="Test Question Field Type" agent="qa-test">
  <node
    id="node1"
    type="task"
    title="Question with Dropdown Options"
    description="Test question field that renders as dropdown when options are provided">
    <dynamic_field
      id="q1"
      type="question"
      name="preferred_database"
      title="Which database do you prefer?"
      description="Select your preferred database system"
      options="PostgreSQL,MySQL,MongoDB,SQLite"
      required="true"
    />
  </node>

  <node
    id="node2"
    type="task"
    title="Question with Free-form Input"
    description="Test question field that renders as text input when no options provided">
    <dynamic_field
      id="q2"
      type="question"
      name="custom_requirement"
      title="Any specific requirements?"
      description="Describe any custom requirements you have"
      required="false"
    />
  </node>

  <node
    id="node3"
    type="task"
    title="Required Question with Empty Options"
    description="Test edge case with empty options string">
    <dynamic_field
      id="q3"
      type="question"
      name="edge_case_empty"
      title="Edge case: empty options"
      description="This has options='' which should behave like no options"
      options=""
      required="true"
    />
  </node>

  <node
    id="node4"
    type="task"
    title="Question with Single Option"
    description="Test edge case with only one option">
    <dynamic_field
      id="q4"
      type="question"
      name="edge_case_single"
      title="Edge case: single option"
      description="This has only one option"
      options="OnlyOption"
      required="false"
    />
  </node>

  <node
    id="node5"
    type="task"
    title="Question with Special Characters"
    description="Test options with special characters and spaces">
    <dynamic_field
      id="q5"
      type="question"
      name="special_chars"
      title="Select deployment target"
      description="Options include special characters"
      options="AWS (Amazon),Google Cloud Platform,Microsoft Azure,On-premise/Private,Kubernetes (k8s)"
      required="false"
    />
  </node>

  <node
    id="node6"
    type="task"
    title="Mixed Field Types"
    description="Test question field alongside other field types to ensure no interference">
    <dynamic_field
      id="q6_question"
      type="question"
      name="framework"
      title="Preferred Framework?"
      options="React,Vue,Angular,Svelte"
      required="true"
    />
    <dynamic_field
      id="q6_string"
      type="string"
      name="project_name"
      title="Project Name"
      required="true"
    />
    <dynamic_field
      id="q6_select"
      type="select"
      name="environment"
      title="Environment"
      options="Development,Staging,Production"
      required="true"
    />
    <dynamic_field
      id="q6_boolean"
      type="boolean"
      name="use_typescript"
      title="Use TypeScript?"
      required="false"
    />
  </node>

  <edge from="node1" to="node2" />
  <edge from="node2" to="node3" />
  <edge from="node3" to="node4" />
  <edge from="node4" to="node5" />
  <edge from="node5" to="node6" />
</plan>
